title: IntentLockSet
description: The FROZEN closed set of remaining build slices = the completion denominator (§5.10 capture window). Emitted once by intent-locker; never shrunk and never grown afterward. Discoveries are classified against it into a separate backlog, never folded back in.

slices.description: Ordered smallest-fail-closed-gate first. slice[0] MUST be a single fail-closed gate + its passing step.

planned_application_oracle.description: Write-time, falsifiable spec of how the live/applied behavior will be checked (the 'applied' facet of §5.8, distinct from correctness).

test_command.description: PER-SLICE command that targets ONLY the test this slice adds (e.g. 'bun test rebuild/schemas/ac-verdict-2facet.test.ts'). MUST NOT be the whole 'bun test rebuild/' island, which is already 51-green and would pass regardless of the slice.

done_state.description: REALIZED-STATE AC ('entrypoint call yields improved behavior · no orphan'), never build activity ('add function · unit green').

touches_intent.description: true only if this slice needs a user-owned intent decision → upfront escalation.
